case_title: LUCKY BRIELLA LLC VS. SYLVIA GUILLESPIE ET AL

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY, (TRANSACTION ID # 100071244): WONG, DAVID YIN SUBSTITUTED FOR AZIZZADEH, SHAWN AS ATTORNEY FOR LUCKY BRIELLA LLC

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LUCKY BRIELLA LLC AS TO DEFENDANT GUILLESPIE, SYLVIA ANDIVIDUALLY GUILLESPIE, SYLVIA TRUSTEE OF THE SYLVIA GUILLESPIE 2017 TRUST DOES 1 TO 25 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JAN-23-2019 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-22-2018 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         DEC-31-2018
MINI MINUTES FOR APR-09-2019 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-09-2019 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE FEB-27-2019 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100079753)
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100051456), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF LUCKY BRIELLA LLC SERVED OCT-03-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GUILLESPIE, SYLVIA ANDIVIDUALLY

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-09-2019 CONTINUED TO AUG-20-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF AUG-20-2019 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100051456), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF LUCKY BRIELLA LLC SERVED OCT-03-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GUILLESPIE, SYLVIA TRUSTEE OF THE SYLVIA GUILLESPIE 2017 TRUST
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JAN-23-2019 CONTINUED TO FEB-27-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
